statements.__comment__: Link KubernetesIngress endpoints to TailscaleService nodes. Endpoint extraction and hostname normalization are done in Python; Cypher only matches graph nodes.
statements.query: UNWIND $K8S_TAILSCALE_ENDPOINTS AS endpoint WITH endpoint WHERE endpoint.resource_type = 'ingress' MATCH (:KubernetesCluster{id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(ing:KubernetesIngress{id: endpoint.resource_id}) MATCH (tailnet:TailscaleTailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(svc:TailscaleService) WHERE toLower(toString(svc.name)) IN [endpoint.host, endpoint.short_name] OR toLower(toString(svc.id)) IN ['svc:' + endpoint.host, 'svc:' + endpoint.short_name] MATCH (tailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(device:TailscaleDevice) WITH ing, endpoint, svc, collect(DISTINCT substring(toLower(toString(device.name)), size(toLower(toString(device.hostname))) + 1)) AS suffixes WHERE suffixes = [endpoint.tailnet_suffix] MERGE (ing)-[r:USES_TAILSCALE_SERVICE]->(svc) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG, r.matched_hostname = endpoint.host, r.match_type = 'service_name', r.source_field = endpoint.source_field

statements.__comment__: Link KubernetesService endpoints to TailscaleService nodes. Service matches are preferred over device matches by the device-linking queries below.
statements.query: UNWIND $K8S_TAILSCALE_ENDPOINTS AS endpoint WITH endpoint WHERE endpoint.resource_type = 'service' MATCH (:KubernetesCluster{id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(k8ssvc:KubernetesService{id: endpoint.resource_id}) MATCH (tailnet:TailscaleTailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(svc:TailscaleService) WHERE toLower(toString(svc.name)) IN [endpoint.host, endpoint.short_name] OR toLower(toString(svc.id)) IN ['svc:' + endpoint.host, 'svc:' + endpoint.short_name] MATCH (tailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(device:TailscaleDevice) WITH k8ssvc, endpoint, svc, collect(DISTINCT substring(toLower(toString(device.name)), size(toLower(toString(device.hostname))) + 1)) AS suffixes WHERE suffixes = [endpoint.tailnet_suffix] MERGE (k8ssvc)-[r:USES_TAILSCALE_SERVICE]->(svc) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG, r.matched_hostname = endpoint.host, r.match_type = 'service_name', r.source_field = endpoint.source_field

statements.__comment__: Link KubernetesIngress endpoints to TailscaleDevice nodes by exact device FQDN or tailnet-scoped short hostname. Skip endpoints already matched to a TailscaleService.
statements.query: UNWIND $K8S_TAILSCALE_ENDPOINTS AS endpoint WITH endpoint WHERE endpoint.resource_type = 'ingress' MATCH (:KubernetesCluster{id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(ing:KubernetesIngress{id: endpoint.resource_id}) WHERE NOT (ing)-[:USES_TAILSCALE_SERVICE {matched_hostname: endpoint.host}]->(:TailscaleService) MATCH (:TailscaleTailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(device:TailscaleDevice) WITH ing, endpoint, device, toLower(toString(device.name)) AS device_name, toLower(toString(device.hostname)) AS device_hostname WHERE device_name = endpoint.host OR (device_hostname = endpoint.short_name AND device_name ENDS WITH '.' + endpoint.tailnet_suffix) MERGE (ing)-[r:USES_TAILSCALE_DEVICE]->(device) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG, r.matched_hostname = endpoint.host, r.match_type = CASE WHEN device_name = endpoint.host THEN 'exact_device_fqdn' ELSE 'device_hostname' END, r.source_field = endpoint.source_field

statements.__comment__: Link KubernetesService endpoints to TailscaleDevice nodes by exact device FQDN or tailnet-scoped short hostname. Skip endpoints already matched to a TailscaleService.
statements.query: UNWIND $K8S_TAILSCALE_ENDPOINTS AS endpoint WITH endpoint WHERE endpoint.resource_type = 'service' MATCH (:KubernetesCluster{id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(k8ssvc:KubernetesService{id: endpoint.resource_id}) WHERE NOT (k8ssvc)-[:USES_TAILSCALE_SERVICE {matched_hostname: endpoint.host}]->(:TailscaleService) MATCH (:TailscaleTailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(device:TailscaleDevice) WITH k8ssvc, endpoint, device, toLower(toString(device.name)) AS device_name, toLower(toString(device.hostname)) AS device_hostname WHERE device_name = endpoint.host OR (device_hostname = endpoint.short_name AND device_name ENDS WITH '.' + endpoint.tailnet_suffix) MERGE (k8ssvc)-[r:USES_TAILSCALE_DEVICE]->(device) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG, r.matched_hostname = endpoint.host, r.match_type = CASE WHEN device_name = endpoint.host THEN 'exact_device_fqdn' ELSE 'device_hostname' END, r.source_field = endpoint.source_field

statements.__comment__: Clean up stale KubernetesIngress Tailscale endpoint relationships for this cluster after current links have been merged.
Clean up stale KubernetesService Tailscale endpoint relationships for this cluster after current links have been merged.
